## Core Principles
Individual liberty and rights; limited government; rule of law; free markets; tolerance; equality of opportunity

## Application
Protect individual freedom; constrain state power; legal equality; market mechanisms; toleration of diversity; rights protection

## Key Values
- Liberty
- Individual rights
- Limited state
- Tolerance
